---
title: "analyze_workflow.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\skills\local\workflow_analyst\analyze_workflow.py"
loc: 46
complexity: 10
logic_score: 2.13
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 4.29
---

## Intent
The `analyze_workflow.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on WorkflowAnalyst, __init__, analyze, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via WorkflowAnalyst, __init__, analyze, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [re](file://re)
- [collections](file://collections)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [os](file://os)

### Exports
- `WorkflowAnalyst`
- `__init__`
- `analyze`
- `main`
